title: UpdateProfileInput
description: Request body for PATCH /auth/profile. Allows a registered user to update their WhatsApp phone number. All fields are optional — omit a field to leave it unchanged; send null to clear it.

phoneNumber.description: WhatsApp-capable phone number in E.164 format (e.g. +31612345678). Must start with + followed by 8–15 digits. Send null to remove the stored number.
